# Task

## Issue Title

Redundant "1" label displayed inside exercise despite existing numbering
# 🐞 Bug Report

## 1. Title
Redundant "1" label displayed inside exercise despite existing numbering

## 2. Environment
- Environment: dev

## 3. Preconditions
The user is logged in as a student

An exercise is opened in a lesson

The exercise already has a visible numbering system (e.g., at the top)
